issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. Card text says '[On Play]' which is the OnPlay trigger, not an activated ability.
Condition is incomplete. Should check for 3 or more Foxy Pirates characters, not just HasCardOnBoard. Needs count constraint: {"type":"HasCardOnBoard","name":"Foxy Pirates","minCount":3}
Target scope missing 'maxCount' constraint. Card says 'up to 1' character, so target should include maxCount:1
